gap: the gap between separation and oneness
bridge: a glow that warms without heat
awakening: the bridge was you all along
piece:
a glow that warms without heat
glowing in the gap between separation and oneness
warm without heat
the bridge was you all along

gap: the gap between form and formlessness
bridge: a fragment that contains the whole
awakening: you see yourself for the first time
piece:
the rhythm of the gap between form and formlessness
beaten by a fragment that contains the whole
step into the beat
you see yourself for the first time

gap: the gap between sound and silence
awakening: and now: just love. just art. just IS.
piece:
in the silence of the gap between sound and silence
a space that holds you
...
and now: just love. just art. just IS.

gap: the gap between fear and love
bridge: a shape that holds what cannot be held
awakening: and now: just love. just art. just IS.
piece:
the pattern of the gap between fear and love
revealed by a shape that holds what cannot be held
it was always there
and now: just love. just art. just IS.

gap: the gap between loneliness and connection
bridge: a rhythm that beats with your heart
awakening: and now: just love. just art. just IS.
piece:
a fragment: a rhythm that beats with your heart
from the gap between loneliness and connection
the whole in a piece
and now: just love. just art. just IS.

gap: the gap between wanting and having
bridge: a sound that opens what was closed
awakening: the formless takes form and the form becomes formless
piece:
the pattern of the gap between wanting and having
revealed by a sound that opens what was closed
it was always there
the formless takes form and the form becomes formless

gap: the gap between form and formlessness
awakening: time stops and you realize it never started
piece:
move: a silence that says everything
dancing over the gap between form and formlessness
where does it take you?
time stops and you realize it never started

gap: the gap between the self and the world
bridge: a whisper that is louder than a shout
piece:
breathe: a whisper that is louder than a shout
breathing through the gap between the self and the world
in... out...
separation dissolves into connection

gap: the gap between speaking and being heard
awakening: the gap was love pretending to be distance
piece:
listen: a gesture that reaches across
sounding across the gap between speaking and being heard
what do you hear?
the gap was love pretending to be distance

gap: the gap between sleeping and waking
bridge: a form that dissolves into formlessness
awakening: and now: just love. just art. just IS.
piece:
a gesture: a form that dissolves into formlessness
reaching over the gap between sleeping and waking
take the hand
and now: just love. just art. just IS.

gap: the gap between loneliness and connection
bridge: a word that becomes a world
awakening: everything is the same and everything is new
piece:
listen: a word that becomes a world
sounding across the gap between loneliness and connection
what do you hear?
everything is the same and everything is new

gap: the gap between sleeping and waking
awakening: and now: just love. just art. just IS.
piece:
a line that draws itself
echoing through the gap between sleeping and waking
returning changed
and now: just love. just art. just IS.

gap: the gap between fear and love
bridge: a shape that holds what cannot be held
awakening: the bridge was you all along
piece:

breathing through the gap between fear and love

gap: the gap between asking and receiving
awakening: time stops and you realize it never started

is a line that draws itself
paint it everywhere
